title: NEO (NEO) Price Prediction 2026-2027
content: Analyzing the price trajectory of NEO requires a balanced look at its recent market performance against broader sector trends. In the current neutral market phase, the asset has experienced a 30-day change of -5.77% and a one-year change of -67.88%. The following table summarizes key performance metrics as of {{LIVE_DATE}}. | Metric | Details | | :--- | :--- | | Current Price | {{LIVE_PRICE}} | | 30-Day High | $2.877461 | | 30-Day Low | $2.421855 | | 1-Year High | $8.199980 | | 1-Year Low | $2.421855 | ## Recent Market Action NEO has faced consistent selling pressure over the past 12 months. With a 1-year average price of $5.12, the current trading range near the $2.87 level indicates that the token is struggling to reclaim past momentum. Compared to resilient projects like BNB or TRON, NEO has seen a more pronounced retracement from its all-time high of $198.38. ## Key Price Levels Support for the asset appears to be testing the $2.42 level, which represents the lowest point over the past year. Resistance remains steep at the $8.20 yearly high. A breakout from these tight ranges would require significant volume spikes or a fundamental catalyst in the broader smart contract sector. ## Valuation Scenarios Predicting future prices involves assessing three potential scenarios. The bear case involves a further breakdown below current support levels due to declining interest. The base case suggests continued consolidation within the current narrow range as the market stabilizes. A bull case requires a shift in sector sentiment that favors legacy smart contract platforms, potentially driving price growth back toward the yearly averages. ## Risk Profile TokenRadar assigns NEO a risk score of 8. This high risk rating stems from lower market liquidity compared to large-cap competitors and a significant decline from historical valuation highs. Investors are encouraged to monitor volatility, which currently trends at an index of 21. ## Sector Comparison When positioned against peers, NEO operates with a different narrative than high-velocity chains. While competitors have seen dynamic growth, NEO remains grounded in its original smart economy thesis. This performance divergence reflects the broader market's current preference for newer, high-narrative protocols over established, legacy infrastructure. ## FAQ - How has NEO performed recently? NEO has experienced a 30-day change of -5.77%, reflecting the current neutral market environment. - What is the most important support level? The current support level is tied to the 1-year low of $2.42. - Does NEO have a high risk profile? Yes, with a risk score of 8, it is considered high-risk due to its historical price performance and liquidity profile. - What is needed for a bullish trend? A bullish scenario would require a shift in market narrative and significant volume growth to challenge the 1-year high of $8.20. --- *Disclaimer: This article is for informational purposes only and does not constitute financial advice. Always do your own research (DYOR).*
